SCR-2026-05-001.list_subtitle: Adhoc screening · Meridian Energy Pension Scheme

summary.headline: No matches across FinCEN
summary.description: Auto-cleared by Decision Engine. No analyst review required.

analysis.label: Likely Different
analysis.headline: Despite the watchlist record listing an alias identical to the screened name (“Meridian Energy Pension Scheme”), the identity context provided is for “Bavarian Industrial Fund / Bavarian IF” in Munich. Key identifiers and core attributes do not align: legal name is different, street address and postal code differ, and the tax identifier differs. The only overlaps are city/country (Munich, DE), which are non-unique. Additionally, the cedent’s registration number value (DE-883-914) matches the watchlist tax identification number, but the cedent labels it as a company registration number while also providing a different tax number (DE-1201-442-008); this inconsistent identifier mapping is insufficient to conclude a true match without corroborating evidence. Overall, the match appears to be a false positive driven by alias/name similarity rather than shared identity.
analysis.body: IRiS weighed name, jurisdiction, registration and ownership indicators against the screening caches.

summary.headline: Raw match found in OFAC
summary.description: IRiS AI reviewed the raw watchlist hit and auto-cleared the entity. No analyst review required.

analysis.label: Likely Different
analysis.headline: The watchlist hit is for a different-named entity ("Northstar Pension Trust" / alias "North Star") while the subject is "Maple Leaf Pension Plan". There is also a country mismatch (CA vs UK). No corroborating identifiers (address, registration, tax ID) are present on the watchlist record to bridge the gap. Given the clear name and jurisdiction mismatch, this appears to be a false positive despite the moderate score.

summary.headline: Raw match found in OFAC
summary.description: IRiS AI reviewed the raw watchlist hit and auto-cleared the entity. No analyst review required.

analysis.label: Likely Different
analysis.headline: The subject name provided is only the generic term "Atlas" with no additional identifiers (address, registration number, tax ID). The watchlist candidates are distinct legal entities ("Atlas Petroleum Holdings JSC" in Russia and "Atlas Insurance" in the United States). While both records include an alias of/containing "Atlas", the subject’s stated country (UK) conflicts with both watchlist jurisdictions (RU, US), and there are no corroborating identifiers to link the subject to either SDN entry. Given the commonness of "Atlas" and lack of matching address/ID data, this is assessed as a false positive rather than a genuine match.

SCR-2026-05-024.list_subtitle: Adhoc screening · Maple Leaf Pension Plan

summary.headline: Raw match found in OFAC
summary.description: IRiS AI reviewed the raw watchlist hit and auto-cleared the entity. No analyst review required.

analysis.label: Likely Different
analysis.headline: The potential match appears to be a false positive. The watchlist entry name ("Northstar Pension Trust") does not match the entity name ("Maple Leaf Pension Plan"), and there are no supporting identifiers (tax ID, registration number) or address details on the watchlist record to bridge the gap. Additionally, the country is inconsistent (CA vs UK) with no evidence of cross-jurisdiction linkage or alias overlap (no shared aliases such as "Maple Leaf"). Given the material name and country mismatches and lack of corroborating identifiers, a genuine SDN match is unlikely.
